metadata.description: ZenHive Claude Code plugins — orchestration and per-language development tooling, each plugin independently toggleable per repo

plugins.name: harness
plugins.description: Language-agnostic orchestration surface for the harness OTP engine — drive the implement → review → land loop (rmap tasks, verified runs, cross-family grading) from any consuming repo. Skills: harness-driver (API/MCP contract), harness-workflow (the loop). Stale-base guard hook.

plugins.name: workflow
plugins.description: Language-agnostic development workflow — worktree-per-branch isolation, the dev lifecycle (task → worktree → review → merge → audit), session-per-phase / evaluator-separation principles, and the upstream-PR contribution flow. Skills: git-worktrees, dev-lifecycle, workflow-philosophy, upstream-pr-workflow.

plugins.name: tasks
plugins.description: Roadmap-driven task management — the rmap roadmap substrate (tasks.toml → ROADMAP.md), D/B/U prioritization scoring, task-as-prompt authoring, and pickup / plan-and-file execution modes. Skills: rmap, task-driver, task-writing, roadmap-planning.

plugins.name: review
plugins.description: Universal staged review chain — code-review (pre-commit single-reviewer triage) and audit-review (post-merge dual-reviewer audit with mandatory Codex). SessionStart hook surfaces unaudited commit tails. Skills: code-review, audit-review.

plugins.name: delegation
plugins.description: Linear-as-queue + cloud-agent (Codex, Cursor, Sprite) delegation. Composable skills: linear-queue (substrate), agent-dispatch, agent-pr-review, flow-review, delegation-rules, cloud-agent-environments, sprite-claude-code.

plugins.name: portfolio
plugins.description: Power-law portfolio rule — cross-repo decision framework for starting, continuing, or killing projects. Classify normal vs power-law bets, check portfolio health, enforce kill criteria. Skill: portfolio-strategy.

plugins.name: git-commit
plugins.description: Intelligent git commit workflow automation with AI-powered file grouping and configurable message formats. Command: /git-commit:commit.

plugins.name: code-quality
plugins.description: Language-agnostic LLM-based code quality gate — blocks untracked TODOs, unmarked deferred work, stub functions, and silent workarounds on every source-file edit.

plugins.name: dev-discipline
plugins.description: Pause-and-pick PreToolUse reminders (non-blocking) at the moments Claude tends to choose ceremony over inline fix: about-to-rmap-new, about-to-add-[[task]]-via-direct-edit, and about-to-sleep/poll. Fires at the trigger word, where memory entries don't.

plugins.name: marketplace-hygiene
plugins.description: Marketplace-integrity hooks: blocks direct edits to auto-synced SKILL.md files (redirecting to the canonical ~/.claude/includes/*.md source via the shared scripts/skill-include-map.sh), and validates marketplace/plugin/hooks JSON on every edit so parse errors surface immediately. Self-contained, no plugin-internal dependencies.

plugins.name: elixir
plugins.description: Essential Elixir/OTP development support — per-edit check hooks (format, compile, test.json, credo, dialyzer.json, sobelow, doctor) plus core skills: code-style, development-commands/philosophy, dialyzer-json, ex-unit-json, elixir-setup, elixir-ci-harness, integration-testing, usage-rules, hex-docs-search, reach, tidewave-guide, web-command, agent-economy, api-toolkit, zen-websocket, nexus-template.

plugins.name: elixir-volt
plugins.description: JS-on-BEAM stack support — the Volt/Phoenix client-side toolchain and its npm hygiene. Skills: elixir-volt, oxc, quickbeam, popcorn, npm-ci-verify, npm-dep-analysis, npm-security-audit. Skills only, no hooks.

plugins.name: elixir-workflows
plugins.description: Workflow-generator plugin — scaffolds project-agnostic research / planning / implementation / QA workflows and the commands that drive them. Skill: workflow-generator. Command: /elixir-workflows:workflow-generator.

plugins.name: tools
plugins.description: Personal/utility CLI-usage reference skills — not tied to a dev-lifecycle process or a specific language. Skill: himalaya.

plugins.name: dep-audit
plugins.description: Ecosystem-detecting dependency-advisory nag — one shared SessionStart hook that checks a repo's pinned deps (Hex/mix.lock, Rust/Cargo.toml under native/, npm/package.json or npm_ex/npm.lock) for known advisories. Watermark-gated, non-blocking, silent when clean or when tooling is absent.
